title: wollastonia uniflora
intro: Wollastonia uniflora, also known as the one-flowered Wollastonia, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family that is native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Wollastonia uniflora include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Wollastonia uniflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations, such as tonics and salves.
